user.title: Setup Enpal Solar Integration
user.description:
Choose how you want to set up your Enpal solar system.

Note: Auto-discovery will scan your network and may take 1-2 minutes. Please be patient during the scan.

discovery.title: Discovered Enpal Devices
discovery.description: Found {discovered_count} device(s) on your network. Select your device:

manual.title: Manual Setup
manual.description: Enter the URL of your Enpal device's web interface

data.url: URL / IP address of the Enpal Box

data.interval: Polling interval (in seconds) - Intervals below 60 seconds are not recommended!
data.timeout: HTTP timeout (in seconds, 10-120) - Increase if sensors frequently become unavailable
data.use_wallbox: Enable Wallbox control (WebSocket mode: direct connection, HTML mode: requires Wallbox add-on)

error.invalid_format: Invalid URL - it must start with http:// and contain a valid IP address or hostname.
error.unreachable: The URL could not be reached - please check the connection and address.
error.wallbox_unreachable: The Wallbox API is not reachable. Make sure the add-on is running and accessible! Test: http://Home-Assistant-IP-ADDRESS:36725/wallbox/status
error.no_devices_found: No Enpal devices found on your network. Please use manual setup.

init.title: Adjust Options
init.description: Here you can configure additional settings

data.url: URL / IP address of the Enpal Box
data.interval: Polling interval (in seconds) - Intervals below 60 seconds are not recommended!
data.timeout: HTTP timeout (in seconds, 10-120) - Increase if sensors frequently become unavailable
data.use_wallbox: Enable Wallbox control (WebSocket mode: direct connection, HTML mode: requires Wallbox add-on)
data.wallbox_mode_source: Wallbox charge mode sensor (firmware 8.50+) - leave on Auto-detect unless the wrong sensor is used
data.wallbox_status_source: Wallbox status sensor (firmware 8.50+) - leave on Auto-detect unless the wrong sensor is used

error.invalid_format: Invalid URL - it must start with http:// and contain a valid IP address or hostname.
error.unreachable: The URL could not be reached - please check the connection and address.
error.wallbox_unreachable: The Wallbox API is not reachable. Make sure the add-on is running and accessible! Test: http://Home-Assistant-IP-ADDRESS:36725/wallbox/status

wallbox_status_source_missing.title: Wallbox status sensor could not be detected

select.title: Select Wallbox status sensor
select.description: Wallbox control is enabled, but no matching status sensor was detected automatically. This can happen with some firmware versions that use a different sensor name. Pick the sensor that shows the Wallbox status (e.g. Available/Charging).

abort.entry_not_found: The integration entry could no longer be found.
